title: rudgea jasminoides subsp. corniculata
intro: Rudgea jasminoides subsp. corniculata, also known as Corniculata Rudgea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rudgea jasminoides subsp. corniculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
